blocks.text: Fitzpatrick wins Valspar at -11. Viktor Hovland slides to T90 — a miserable week on the Florida swing as the season's marquee events approach.
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Aramco Japanese GP at Suzuka — Russell leads Antonelli by 4pts in the 2026 title fight

blocks.label: 🚴 Spring Classics — Norwegian charge
items: Fri 11:52 — E3 Saxo Classic: Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard on the cobbles
Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Wærenskjold hunts Norway's best Classic result of the spring
